content: I think about you a lot Ara. I think about how your family misses you. I think about how Jorty must miss you too and has to continue living without your love. I think about your puppy. I think about the plush I got you. I think about your cat headphones. And I fear I wasn't a good enough friend to stop you. But that's selfish because I know you were suffering a lot. But I wish you would have reached out. I wish we could have hung out once more if I knew how much you were truly hurting. How could the smartest person I know be so stupid? And when I think about you, I am so sorry I told you that conditioner could be used as shaving cream. I am sorry that it burnt. I wish I could go back in time and tell you how amazing you are. I'm sorry I was a bit scared to really face that truly. I'm so sorry Ara. We all failed you. My heart breaks and I still cry about this loss. 07.06.26
